A clear description of the behaviour you saw.

## What you expected

What BLACK SEA should have done instead.

Steps, or the prompt / tasking you gave. Include the tier (FLASH / FULL) and lane if relevant.

## Prime-Directive note

BLACK SEA must never fabricate. If the bug is the skill *inventing* a source, figure, or record — or
blurring FACT / ASSESSMENT / ASSUMPTION — say so explicitly; that is the highest-severity class of bug.

## Anything else

Logs, screenshots, or the offending output (redact anything sensitive).
